div.style: color: rgb(51, 51, 51) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 260px; text-align: center; width: 260px;

span.p:
orphan_token · amt_ledger_mismatch
(live hash) · dead_anchor (page bounds)
· missing_exhibit · missing_statutory_term
· undisposed_adverse · prose_total_mismatch

div.style: color: rgb(51, 51, 51) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 260px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Compliance pass
(precondition: draft registry version
== live version, else DraftRegistryDrift)

div.style: color: rgb(51, 51, 51) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 260px; text-align: center; width: 260px;

span.p:
Per-section judge — Sonnet
on the EXACT persisted prompt snapshot
(hash mismatch -> SnapshotDrift)
kinds: unsupported_causation,
strategy_drift, tone
double parse failure -> fail-visible finding

div.style: color: rgb(51, 51, 51) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 260px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Findings — all BLOCKING in v1
lifecycle: open -> patched/regenerated
-> re_verified -> dispositioned

div.style: color: rgb(51, 51, 51) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 260px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(51, 51, 51) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 260px; text-align: center;

span.p:
semantic bucket -> regen
fix-instructions ride retry_violations
(snapshot-neutral) -> back to drafting

div.style: color: rgb(51, 51, 51) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 260px; text-align: center;

span.p:
HARD BLOCKS — never shippable:
orphan_token, amt_ledger_mismatch,
dead_anchor, missing_exhibit,
undisposed_adverse
(short-circuit the judge)

div.style: color: rgb(51, 51, 51) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 260px; text-align: center;

span.p:
compliance_review — G3
attorney reads letter w/ clickable spans,
disposes findings, approves
[no_blocking_findings guard]

div.style: color: rgb(51, 51, 51) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 260px; text-align: center;

span.p:
back to drafting:
new draft version, then
a fresh compliance pass
